				export function compiledContent() {
					return html;
				}
				export function getHeadings() {
					return [{"depth":2,"slug":"symbols","text":"Symbols"},{"depth":2,"slug":"a","text":"A"},{"depth":2,"slug":"b","text":"B"},{"depth":2,"slug":"c","text":"C"},{"depth":2,"slug":"d","text":"D"},{"depth":2,"slug":"e","text":"E"},{"depth":2,"slug":"f","text":"F"},{"depth":2,"slug":"g","text":"G"},{"depth":2,"slug":"h","text":"H"},{"depth":2,"slug":"i","text":"I"},{"depth":2,"slug":"jk","text":"JK"},{"depth":2,"slug":"l","text":"L"},{"depth":2,"slug":"m","text":"M"},{"depth":2,"slug":"n","text":"N"},{"depth":2,"slug":"o","text":"O"},{"depth":2,"slug":"p","text":"P"},{"depth":2,"slug":"qr","text":"QR"},{"depth":2,"slug":"s","text":"S"},{"depth":2,"slug":"t","text":"T"},{"depth":2,"slug":"u","text":"U"},{"depth":2,"slug":"v","text":"V"},{"depth":2,"slug":"w","text":"W"},{"depth":2,"slug":"x","text":"X"},{"depth":2,"slug":"yz","text":"YZ"},{"depth":2,"slug":"链接","text":"链接"}];

				export const Content = createComponent((result, _props, slots) => {
					const { layout, ...content } = frontmatter;
					content.file = file;
					content.url = url;

					return render`${maybeRenderHead(result)}${unescapeHTML(html)}`;
				});
				export default Content;
